name: unknown-first
description: Unknown-first workflow skills for resolving project unknowns before implementation.

interface.longDescription: Unknown First adds a Superpowers-style workflow for blindspot passes, disposable prototypes, interviews, implementation plans, execution notes, closeout, and project memory updates.
defaultPrompt: Use unknown-first:blindspot-pass before implementing this change.
Use unknown-first:plan-and-notes to prepare an approval-gated implementation plan.
Use unknown-first:memory-update to record resolved unknowns.
